category_sources: Official GitHub README describes dyff as a diff tool for YAML files and sometimes JSON.

display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the name dyff.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/homeport/dyff; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents YAML/JSON input handling and command-line usage.
